firmware.title: Tcard_X6739-H931GH-U-GL-241114V752
firmware.description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6739-H931GH-U-GL-241114V752

Changed Functions:
1. Upgraded the Android version from Android 13 to Android 14.
2. Upgraded the OS version from XOS 13.0.0 to XOS 14.0.
3. Upgraded/added some special features that users are concerned about and optimized them for more apps to improve the overall experience. These features include but are not limited to Esports Pro, Network Enhancement, Game Assistant Panel 3.6, XArena 3.6, and Dynamic Bar 2.0.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
